title: Summit Wrench — Slate
summary: Summit wrench in slate; built in Spain for daily use.

content.text:
# Summit Wrench — Slate

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Summit Wrench — Slate is designed for the long haul, with tools-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Spain.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
{"weight_g":1542,"materials":{"upper":"waxed canvas","sole":"crepe rubber","lining":"cotton twill"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Spain","length_cm":14}
